title: I AM HERE
description: A simple mod that helps players share their coordinates and location visually with others. Just type /iamhere to broadcast your position and briefly glow to be seen easily. Perfect for multiplayer exploration.
body:
# I Am Here Mod

## Overview

**"I Am Here"** is a lightweight coordinate sharing mod for Minecraft.  
It allows players to quickly let others know where they are by using a simple command.

Ideal for multiplayer adventures, this mod enhances communication and visibility without needing voice chat or map mods.

## Features

- 🔹 Use the `/iamhere` command to share your current coordinates in the chat.
- ✨ Your player glows for 5 seconds when you run the command.
- 🌍 The message includes dimension info (Overworld, Nether, End).

## How to Use

1. Open the in-game chat (default: `T` key).
2. Type `/iamhere` and press Enter.
3. Your coordinates will be broadcasted to all players, and you’ll glow briefly.

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/).
2. Download and place [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) in your `mods` folder.
3. Download and place this mod's `.jar` file in your `mods` folder.
4. Launch Minecraft.

## Compatibility

- Minecraft: `1.21.5`
- Fabric Loader: `0.16.12+`
- Requires: `Fabric API`
- Java: `21+`

## Author

**IzmYuta**

## Source Code

[https://github.com/IzmYuta/iamhere](https://github.com/IzmYuta/iamhere)

---

🧭 This mod was made to help players locate each other more easily in multiplayer games.  
It’s simple, effective, and made to improve coordination without adding complexity.
